---
title: "Appendix A - Geographe Marine Park Natural Values Report"
subtitle: "South-west Marine Parks Network"
format:
  pdf:
    output-file: "Project 4.21-Geographe-2-Appendix A-q-Natural values.pdf"
toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
post-render: 11_move-pdf.R
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(here)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(terra)
library(tidyterra)
```

# Natural Values

Understanding of natural values

### Benthic ecosystem extent – dominant habitat types

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-cap: "Predicted dominant habitat type"
p_cat_multi <- readRDS(here("plots/geographe/habitat/GeographeAMP_predicted-habitat-categorical_2014-2024.rds"))
p_cat_multi
```

### Benthic ecosystem extent – habitat distribution and probability

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| out-width: "70%"
#| fig-cap: "Predicted habitat distribution probability and uncertainty"
include_graphics(here("plots/geographe/habitat/GeographeAMP_predicted-dominant-benthos-and-combined-se_2014-2024.png"))
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4
#| fig-cap: "Habitat classes observed in benthic imagery. Habitat classes observed in spatially balanced stereo-BRUV and drop-camera imagery visualised as spatial pie charts. The green polygon represents the extent of no-take National Park Zones and State no-take sanctuary zones. The bathymetric contour shown is 30 m which represents ecosystem depth contours."
p_scatterpie_multi <- readRDS(here("plots/geographe/habitat/GeographeAMP_scatterpie_2014-2024.rds"))
p_scatterpie_multi
```
